title: Scottish Greens' Proposal to Evict US Military from Prestwick Airport Rejected

sections.heading: Scottish Greens' Position
sections.content: The Scottish Green Party has argued that Prestwick Airport is predominantly sustained by the activities of the military, which they claim overshadow commercial airline operations.

sections.heading: Response to the Proposal
sections.content: Despite the Greens' assertions regarding the airport's financial dependency on military usage, the proposal to terminate US military operations at Prestwick has faced opposition.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Scottish Greens' call to evict US military from Prestwick Airport slapped down
